title: Getting Started with Next.js 14: A Complete Guide

content.text: Next.js 14 brings exciting new features and improvements that make building modern web applications easier than ever. In this comprehensive guide, we'll explore everything you need to know to get started.

items: **Turbopack**: Faster local development with Rust-based bundler
**Partial Prerendering**: Best of both static and dynamic rendering
**Improved Image Optimization**: Better performance and DX

content.text: Let's start by creating a new Next.js 14 project:

content.code:
npx create-next-app@latest my-app
cd my-app
npm run dev

content.text: The App Router is the recommended way to build Next.js applications. Here's a simple example:
Server Components are the default in Next.js 14. They run on the server and don't send JavaScript to the client:
When you need interactivity, use Client Components with the "use client" directive:
Deploy your Next.js app to Vercel with zero configuration:

Next.js 14 is a powerful framework that makes building modern web applications a breeze. With features like Server Components, improved performance, and excellent developer experience, it's the perfect choice for your next project.
